title: MARA Announces Strategic Partnership with Starwood to Accelerate Delivery of Digital Infrastructure
text: MARA Holdings, Inc. announced a strategic agreement with Starwood Capital Group and their dedicated data center development platform Starwood Digital Ventures to accelerate delivery of cutting-edge hyperscale, enterprise and AI-capable digital infrastructure. The partnership will enable the conversion and expansion of select MARA sites into next generation digital infrastructure capable of meeting the growing demand from enterprise, hyperscale and AI customers. MARA and Starwood will jointly develop, finance, and operate digital infrastructure projects across MARA's existing power-rich portfolio. Starwood Digital Ventures will lead design, development, tenant sourcing, construction and facility operations with Starwood providing investment expertise to support enhanced project-level economics, while MARA will contribute dedicated, energy-advanced data center sites. The companies expect to deliver approximately 1 gigawatt of near-term IT capacity with a pathway to more than 2.5 gigawatts. By combining MARA's energy-backed infrastructure and operating discipline with SDV's proven track record, the companies aim to bring leading digital infrastructure to market faster with greater certainty than traditional development models.
